calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-550201 WITH CASE CGC-16-554987
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-550201 WITH CASE CGC-16-554987 - Plaintiff CSAA Insurance Exchange's motion to consolidate this case with case 550201 is granted. No opposition filed. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case 550201 is the lead case and all filings must be in that case only. The August 7, 2017 trial date set in 550201 remains and now applies to both consolidated cases. The May 24, 2017 case management conference date set in this case is now vacated. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 = 302/hk

Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
